description: UI launchers for the fix and new lifecycles. Cockpit entry points to start `compose fix <bug>` and `compose new "<intent>"` (and resume an aborted fix). The Pipeline tab already renders these stratum flows once running — this adds the missing launch/resume controls so UI-first devs aren't forced to the terminal for the two richest lifecycles. Reuses POST /api/build/start-style dispatch.

completions.notes: UI launchers for fix/new + resume; mode:'new'/'bug'+resume on /api/build/start. Shipped in parity batch.
